context: Seras said: Yes and no. Max level normally is 10. Max level with augments is 20. (She still has to spend points or grind to get that high though.) She theoretically can go beyond 20 but that is very difficult and grinding isn't the answer. She definitely can't benchpress planets even beyond 20 though, she isn't Superman. She may be no Superman, but between her Gamer Shard levelling and her Netrunning... she could always troll anyone's Kiroshi Optics into thinking she might as well be... ...li...
